# thoth_billing_credit_bank (Data Source)

Reads active prepaid credit-bank balances and low-balance alert status.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "thoth_billing_credit_bank" "wallets" {
  average_monthly_burn_cents = 250000
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `as_of` (String) RFC3339 timestamp used for active wallet filtering. Defaults to now.
- `average_monthly_burn_cents` (Number) Optional burn baseline used to compute 20% low-balance threshold.

### Read-Only

- `active_wallet_count` (Number) Number of active wallets included in this snapshot.
- `active_wallets_json` (String) Active wallets array as JSON.
- `low_balance_alert` (Boolean) True when active credit balance is below low-balance threshold.
- `low_balance_threshold_cents` (Number) Computed low-balance threshold (20% of average monthly burn when provided).
- `response_json` (String) Full credit bank response payload as JSON.
- `total_active_balance_cents` (Number) Total active credit balance across non-expired wallets.
